message:
test(cli,ratelimit,testkit): add unit tests for CLI modules, rate limiting, and test fixtures

fcp-cli tests (~1570 lines):
- bench: normalize_size_label, parse_size_bytes, BenchmarkConfig
  defaults/builder, BenchmarkResult statistics helpers
- bench/runner: run configuration, warmup behavior
- bench/types: BenchmarkMetrics, LatencyHistogram, outlier detection
- budget: BudgetConfig defaults/validation, BudgetEntry arithmetic
- budget/types: BudgetSummary, BudgetAlert thresholds
- context/types: ContextConfig, ContextEntry, ContextFilter matching
- doctor: DiagnosticCheck enum variants, CheckResult severity,
  SystemInfo collection, DoctorReport summary generation
- net: NetworkConfig defaults, RetryConfig builder, ConnectionPool
  settings, proxy configuration, TLS options
- package: PackageManifest validation, VersionConstraint parsing,
  DependencySpec resolution, PackageLock integrity

fcp-ratelimit tests (~467 lines):
- lib.rs: RateLimitConfig construction, with_burst, with_queue,
  presets (sixty_per_minute, etc.), Default impl
- sliding_window.rs: SlidingWindowLimiter allow/deny, window reset,
  burst allowance, concurrent access, metrics tracking, edge cases
  (zero window, very large burst)

fcp-testkit tests (~159 lines):
- fixtures.rs: TestFixture lifecycle, TempDir creation, port
  allocation, fixture configuration, cleanup behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
